messages.content: You are an ERP SQL generator. Respond ONLY with JSON.
Show me branch-wise sales for this month

{"reportTitle":"Branch-wise Sales This Month","explanation":"Total sales amount and bill count grouped by branch for the current month.","sql":"SELECT b.branch_name, COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS total_bills, COALESCE(SUM(d.amount),0) AS total_sales FROM sales_trans_hdr h JOIN branch_mst b ON b.branch_code = h.branch_code JOIN sales_dtl d ON d.sales_trans_hdr_id = h.id WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', h.voucher_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY b.branch_name ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1000","confidence":0.97}
You are an ERP SQL generator. Respond ONLY with JSON.
Top 10 customers by purchase amount this year

{"reportTitle":"Top 10 Customers by Sales This Year","explanation":"Ranks customers by total amount spent in the current financial year.","sql":"SELECT c.name AS customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS total_bills, COALESCE(SUM(d.amount),0) AS total_spent FROM sales_trans_hdr h JOIN customer c ON c.id = h.customer_id JOIN sales_dtl d ON d.sales_trans_hdr_id = h.id WHERE DATE_TRUNC('year', h.voucher_date) = DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) AND h.customer_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10","confidence":0.93}
You are an ERP SQL generator. Respond ONLY with JSON.
Which supplier did we buy the most from last month?

{"reportTitle":"Top Suppliers Last Month","explanation":"Total purchase amount per supplier for the previous calendar month.","sql":"SELECT ph.supplier_name, COUNT(DISTINCT ph.id) AS total_orders, COALESCE(SUM(pd.amount),0) AS total_purchased FROM purchase_hdr ph JOIN purchase_dtl pd ON pd.parent_id = ph.id WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', ph.voucher_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') GROUP BY ph.supplier_name ORDER BY total_purchased DESC LIMIT 1000","confidence":0.95}
You are an ERP SQL generator. Respond ONLY with JSON.
Items with zero sales in the last 60 days but stock available

{"reportTitle":"Slow Moving Items","explanation":"Items that have stock on hand but no recorded sales in the past 60 days.","sql":"SELECT im.item_name, im.item_code, COALESCE(SUM(ibm.qty_in - ibm.qty_out),0) AS stock_qty FROM item_mst im JOIN item_batch_mst ibm ON ibm.item_id = im.id WHERE im.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT d.item_id FROM sales_dtl d JOIN sales_trans_hdr h ON h.id = d.sales_trans_hdr_id WHERE h.voucher_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days') GROUP BY im.item_name, im.item_code HAVING COALESCE(SUM(ibm.qty_in - ibm.qty_out),0) > 0 ORDER BY stock_qty DESC LIMIT 1000","confidence":0.92}
You are an ERP SQL generator. Respond ONLY with JSON.

{"reportTitle":"Category-wise Sales This Month","explanation":"Total sales amount broken down by product category for the current month.","sql":"SELECT icm.category_name, COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS total_bills, COALESCE(SUM(d.amount),0) AS total_sales FROM sales_trans_hdr h JOIN sales_dtl d ON d.sales_trans_hdr_id = h.id JOIN item_category_mst icm ON icm.item_id = d.item_id WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', h.voucher_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY icm.category_name ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1000","confidence":0.90}
